name: It is clear that only those who have a surplus of earnings over their basic requirements
introduction:
can lend out money at interest. This surplus, according to the Qur'an, constitutes God's
bounty. And true thankfulness for this bounty requires that a person should be bountiful
towards other creatures of God even as the Creator has been to him. If, instead of doing this,
the person tries to become richer at the expense of those whose present earnings are
insufficient to meet their needs, he is at once guilty of ungratefulness to God, and blatantly
unjust, cruel and wicked.
